compose.title: New note
compose.lede: The note is encrypted in your browser, stored briefly, and destroyed the moment it is read.
compose.placeholder: Type your message here. It never reaches the server in plain text.
success.title: Note ready
success.lede: Share this link. It will be destroyed the moment it is opened.
success.kill.title: Destroy now
success.kill.hint: If you change your mind, you can destroy the note before it is read.
success.kill.confirm: Destroy this note? This cannot be undone.
success.killed: Destroyed. The link is now inactive.
reveal.title: Incoming note
reveal.lede: Reading this note will destroy it. You can only see it once.
reveal.tip1: Make sure you are ready to read it now
reveal.tip2: Make sure no one is looking over your shoulder
errors.pow_failed: Proof of work failed. Please retry.
